meta.title: Egypt's Enduring Security Challenges
meta.description: Hudson Institute hosts a panel discussion with top Egypt analysts Samuel Tadros, Michael Wahid Hanna, Amy Hawthorne, and Mokhtar Awad and moderated by Eric Brown.
